name: skill-evolve
description: Skill Evolution Engine — Darwin-style autonomous SKILL.md optimizer. Applies an 8-dimension rubric (60 structural + 40 effectiveness), independent-subagent scoring, and git-backed ratchet hill-climbing (keep-or-revert) to evolve any Claude Code skill from initial draft toward 90+. Inspired by Karpathy's autoresearch and alchaincyf/darwin-skill.
